items.definition_en: An apple is a round fruit that is usually red, green, or yellow.
items.example_en: She put an apple in her shopping basket.

items.definition_en: Bread is a common food made from flour and water.
items.example_en: He bought fresh bread at the store.

items.definition_en: Cheese is a food made from milk.
items.example_en: We need some cheese for the sandwiches.

items.definition_en: Coffee is a hot drink made from roasted beans.
items.example_en: He drinks a cup of coffee every morning.

items.definition_en: An egg is a round object from a bird, used as food.
items.example_en: She bought a dozen eggs at the market.

items.definition_en: A carrot is a long orange vegetable.
items.example_en: He added a carrot to the soup.

items.definition_en: Chicken is a common kind of meat from a bird.
items.example_en: We are having chicken for dinner tonight.

items.definition_en: Rice is a small white or brown grain used as food.
items.example_en: She served rice with the curry.

items.definition_en: A banana is a long, yellow fruit.
items.example_en: He brought a banana for his snack.

items.definition_en: Milk is a white liquid from cows or other animals.
items.example_en: We need to buy more milk today.

items.definition_en: Butter is a soft yellow food made from milk.
items.example_en: He spread butter on his toast.

items.definition_en: A cucumber is a long green vegetable.
items.example_en: She puts cucumber in her salad.

items.definition_en: Flour is a white or brown powder used for baking.
items.example_en: He bought flour to make bread.

items.definition_en: Lettuce is a leafy green vegetable used in salads.
items.example_en: She bought a head of lettuce for the sandwich.

items.definition_en: Oil is a liquid used in cooking or frying food.
items.example_en: They ran out of oil so they bought more.

items.definition_en: Orange juice is a drink made from oranges.
items.example_en: She likes to drink orange juice with breakfast.

items.definition_en: A potato is a round vegetable with brown skin.
items.example_en: He boiled a potato for dinner.

items.definition_en: Salt is a white substance used to flavor food.
items.example_en: She always adds salt to her soup.

items.definition_en: Sugar is a sweet white or brown substance used in food.
items.example_en: He put sugar in his tea.

items.definition_en: Yogurt is a creamy food made from milk.
items.example_en: She eats yogurt for breakfast every day.
